_schemaDescription: Risk Assessment – Heat Map sample payload. Universe-level view: 20 entities total, 17 scored. Color zones: Yellow/Medium Risk (4 entities), Green/Low Risk (13 entities). 3 entities unscored. Zero Red entities, demonstrating suppression of empty zones.

_drillDownExamples.universe: This payload (all entities in audit universe)
_drillDownExamples.entity: If user clicks 'Corporate Governance' → viewContext.currentLevel becomes 'entity', itemType becomes 'layer', contextPath becomes 'Corporate Governance', colorDistribution shows layers of Corporate Governance
_drillDownExamples.layer: If user clicks 'Financial Controls' → itemType becomes 'process', contextPath becomes 'Corporate Governance > Financial Controls'
_drillDownExamples.process: If user clicks 'Budget Approval' → itemType becomes 'risk', contextPath becomes 'Corporate Governance > Financial Controls > Budget Approval'

colorDistribution.description: 17 scored entities: 4 Yellow (Medium Risk), 13 Green (Low Risk). 3 entities unscored.

priorityItems.description: Top 3 entities by residual score requiring immediate audit attention.
